chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-1533 of 2022 (Ghulam Mujtaba & others Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 01-02-2024. Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Shaharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant A.G, Sindh. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. The petitioners by way of instant petition have sought for direction against the respondents to inter-alia reconsider their case for their appointment as Primary School Teachers. The subject test admittedly was conducted in year, 2013. The instant petition is filed in year, 2022, it is badly hit by laches; thus is dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
